text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her debut, one of Mihono Bourbon's
interviews is published as a magazine article.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, the article is highly critical and points
out how a sprinter like her doesn't have the
aptitude for the long-distance Triple Crown races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon is determined to place well at
the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes in order to convince
the public of her abilities.
